summary: Iteration 173: PVP Photo Game Stamina Fix - All 12 tests PASSED. Bug fix verified: pvp_matchmaking.py and photo_game.py now correctly check photo's stamina (defaults to 100%) instead of player_stats.stamina (which defaulted to 0).

features_tested: GET /api/photo-game/battle-photos - PASS (returns photos with correct stamina: 91.9%)
POST /api/photo-game/pvp/find-match - PASS (no stamina error, status: in_match)

bug_fix_verification.root_cause: pvp_matchmaking.py line 239 and photo_game.py line 943 were checking stats.get('stamina', 0) from player_stats collection (defaults to 0) instead of the actual photo's stamina field (defaults to 100%)
bug_fix_verification.fix_location_1: pvp_matchmaking.py lines 235-248 - now queries minted_photos collection and uses photo.get('stamina', 100)
bug_fix_verification.fix_location_2: photo_game.py lines 937-957 - now queries minted_photos collection and uses photo_for_check.get('stamina', 100)
bug_fix_verification.verification: Test photo mint_10fe1f499efb4ef6 correctly shows stamina of 91.9%, find-match and start-match succeed without stamina errors

critical_code_review_comments: Stamina default change is correct: photo.get('stamina', 100) ensures new photos work immediately
MongoDB query optimization: Only fetching necessary fields (stamina, mint_id) for stamina check
Double-check pattern in pvp_matchmaking.py lines 265-288 also queries minted_photos again, could be consolidated
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test photo mint_10fe1f499efb4ef6
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP stamina fix verified and working. Test user has 1 minted photo (mint_10fe1f499efb4ef6) with ~87-92% stamina. PVP matchmaking and game start now correctly check photo stamina (defaults to 100%) instead of player_stats.stamina (which was defaulting to 0 and blocking new players).

rca_of_the_issue.bug_description: PVP photo battles were failing with 'Not enough stamina' error even for new players with fresh photos
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: pvp_matchmaking.py find_match() and photo_game.py start_game() were checking player_stats.stamina (defaults to 0 for new players) instead of the actual photo's stamina field (defaults to 100%)
rca_of_the_issue.impact: All new players were unable to create or start PVP battles
rca_of_the_issue.fix_verified: find-match returns success, match-status shows bot match, start-match creates game session
